message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam classFontColor #333333 skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam interfaceBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam interfaceFontColor #333333 skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #C8E6C9 skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #81C784 skinparam stereotypeABackgroundColor #B3E5FC skinparam stereotypeABorderColor #4FC3F7 skinparam stereotypeIBackgroundColor #D1C4E9 skinparam stereotypeIBorderColor #9575CD class JuniorExperienceManager { } class PrimaryExperienceManager { } class SeniorExperienceManager { } class AbstractExperienceManager { + next: LevelManager } interface LevelManager { + handleExperience(): void + forName(): String } JuniorExperienceManager --|> AbstractExperienceManager PrimaryExperienceManager --|> AbstractExperienceManager SeniorExperienceManager --|> AbstractExperienceManager AbstractExperienceManager o-- "1" LevelManager AbstractExperienceManager --|> LevelManager note right of AbstractExperienceManager Abstract Class Defines the chain structure end note note right of LevelManager Interface Defines the handler contract end note @enduml
